title.en: China-to-Switzerland Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入瑞士：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入瑞士：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Switzerland CE-aligned product requirements, SNV-adopted EN/IEC standards, Swissgrid interconnection practice, anti-islanding and protection settings, and China baseline references.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与瑞士CE对齐产品要求、SNV采标EN/IEC标准、Swissgrid并网实践、防孤岛与保护参数，以及中国基线参考的对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與瑞士CE對齊產品要求、SNV採標EN/IEC標準、Swissgrid併網實踐、防孤島與保護參數，以及中國基線參考的對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, legal market-access decision, CE scope determination, SNV standard-determination, Swissgrid approval, or transport clearance. Exporters, importers, developers, and installers should verify current Swiss requirements with qualified professionals before shipment, interconnection, and operation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定、市场准入裁定、CE适用范围裁定、SNV标准采标裁定、Swissgrid批准或运输放行。出口商、进口商、开发商和安装方应在出货、并网和运行前与合格专业人士核实现行瑞士要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定、市場准入裁定、CE適用範圍裁定、SNV標準採標裁定、Swissgrid批准或運輸放行。出口商、進口商、開發商和安裝方應在出貨、併網和運行前與合格專業人士核實現行瑞士要求。

answer_first.en: For Chinese inverters exported to Switzerland, the primary practical gap is Switzerland-facing conformity evidence under SNV-adopted CE-aligned rules, Swissgrid interconnection and commissioning requirements, and local voltage-profile configuration, including 230/400 V operation and 50 Hz implementation, while confirming whether Switzerland requires EN 62109 and anti-islanding parameters for the exact model.
answer_first.zh: 中国逆变器出口瑞士时，主要实际差距在于针对瑞士市场的SNV采标CE对齐规则下合规证据、Swissgrid并网与投运要求，以及本地电压与参数设置。瑞士采用230/400 V、50 Hz配置，与中国220/380 V口径不同，且应确认目标型号是否需EN 62109和防孤岛参数。
answer_first.zht: 中國逆變器出口瑞士時，主要實際差距在於針對瑞士市場的SNV採標CE對齊規則下合規證據、Swissgrid併網與投運要求，以及本地電壓與參數設定。瑞士採用230/400 V、50 Hz配置，與中國220/380 V口徑不同，且應確認目標型號是否需EN 62109和防孤島參數。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, customs authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
